⌞ EXTRA INFO ⌝

⇒ SCENARIO.init

During the final fest, Hivemind is trying to convince you to join Team Orde.⋆‧°𓏲ּ𝄢

⇒ HAZARD.init

None

⇒ CREATOR.init

Pre-writing drabble! Yayyy... Ah, I apologise once more for disappearing out of thin air once again. Your girl has been busy. I'm going to finish up all these remaining requests + I want to write for a new character! From...a new series. I have really been updating my 'fandoms-i-write-for' list. He'll still be a Nintendo character, albeit kind of niche? He did appear in a movie though. Think I gave y'all enough hints...(⁠.⁠ ⁠❛⁠ ⁠ᴗ⁠ ⁠❛⁠.⁠)

⇒ PATCH_NOTES.init

I tried to make Hivemind more up to my headcanons! Hope y'all won't mind...He's probably a bit more selfish and self-absorbed but he's still much into organisation.⋆‧°𓏲ּ𝄢

⬡ REQUESTED? Y / N ⬡
